snippet: Where a student is unable to attend their school due to a temporary closure arising from an emergency event (including but not limited to floods, bushfires and other natural or environmental hazards), another government school (host school) that has capacity to accept the student’s enrolment on a temporary basis may do so. In these circumstances, the following arrangements apply: Communication between schools The principal of the host school must advise the principal of the student’s substantive school (base school). Student information transfer
